calendar.matters:
Hearing On Claim Of Right To Possession
Off Calendar Nov-09-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Danny Martinelli, Certified Law Student, and Supervising Attorney Ora S. Prochovnick, Esq., Housing Advocacy Clinic, (415) 982-8399, for Claimant Elizabeth Buggs
Kevin J. Stewart, Esq., (510) 663-4877, for Plaintiff Richard E. Thomas
RULING:
A R G U E D; evidentiary testimony was heard. Elizabeth Buggs and Thelma Lucas were sworn in and testified for Moving Party. Richard E. Thomas was sworn in and testified for Opposing Party. The following exhibits were marked and received into evidence on behalf of Claimant:
Exhibit A: Copy of Rental Agreement dated 6/26/95 between Richard E. Thomas and D. Dirks
Exhibit B-1: Letter and Envelope with postmark dated 4/1/96 from Mr. Vladerick Crawford to Elizabeth Bugg with Postal forwarding label to Elizabeth Buggs at 1265 Girard St, San Francisco, CA 94134
Exhibit B-2: Letter and Envelope with postmark dated 3/13/96 from K. Nangle to Elizabeth Buggs
Exhibit B-3: Envelope postmarked 1996 addressed to Elizabeth Buggs; Upper center of envelope was torn
Exhibit C: Copy of Elizabeth Buggs' driver license expiring on 9/14/07
Exhibit D: Billing Statement from JC Penny dated 8/7/02 to Elizabeth Buggs at 1265 Girard Street
Exhibit E: Elizabeth Bugg's 2004 Check Book
The following exhibit was marked for identification only on behalf of Claimant:
Exhibit F: Letter date 10/31/04 signed by Nina Bailey, Church Clerk, and Rev. S.A. Bailey, Pastor

HEARING ON CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION (TRANSFERRED FROM DEPT. 612): GRANTED. Elizabeth Buggs' Right of Possession was established. Ms. Buggs shall be named in this proceeding and in all furture filings. Service will be deemed which triggers rent; Ms. Buggs was served today. Claimant's Exhibits A to F were returned to Claimant. (301/JLW/) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

Hearing On Claim Of Right To Possession
Off Calendar Nov-09-2004 Text Ruling

HEARING ON CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION
Off Calendar Nov-01-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Ora Pruchovnick, Esq. and Daniel Martinelli, Law Student (415) 982-8399 for Claimant and Moving Party Elizabeth Buggs
Kevin J. Stewart, Esq. (510) 663-4877 for Plaintiff Thomas
RULING:
Counsel for Claimant will file substitution of attorney today. Discussion regarding calendaring procedure for claims of right to possession. The Court adopts its tentative ruling: CLAIMANT ELIZABETH BUGGS' HEARING ON CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION: OFF CALENDAR; to be renoticed in the Discovery Department. Plaintiff's Counsel stipulates that the Claimant, Elizabeth Buggs, will not be evicted until the hearing of the claim of right to possession has been resolved. (301/JLW/) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
